evals.prompt: I want to build a multi-agent research pipeline: an orchestrator that routes queries to specialized agents (web researcher, document analyzer, synthesizer). Python, small startup team.
evals.expected_output: Creates Python multi-agent project structure with agents/ directory containing researcher, analyzer, and synthesizer agents, state/ or context.py for shared state, prompts/agents/ for agent-specific prompts, CLAUDE.md documenting agent architecture and orchestration routing logic, .mcp.json with memory and brave-search MCP servers.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md contains 'Agent Architecture' or 'Agent Roles'
CLAUDE.md mentions orchestrator and routing logic
CLAUDE.md mentions researcher, analyzer, and synthesizer agents (or similar role names)
Folder structure includes agents/ directory with agent files
Folder structure includes state/ directory or context.py for shared state
Folder structure includes prompts/agents/ directory
.mcp.json includes memory and brave-search servers

evals.prompt: Build a TypeScript agent system: an orchestrator that dispatches to a coder agent and a reviewer agent that run in parallel. Solo developer, production system.
evals.expected_output: Creates TypeScript multi-agent project with orchestrator.ts, agents/coder.ts and agents/reviewer.ts for parallel execution, state/context.ts for shared state, CLAUDE.md describing fan-out parallel orchestration pattern and coder/reviewer agent roles, .mcp.json with memory and github MCP servers, .claude/settings.json with ESLint/Prettier or TypeScript hooks.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md mentions 'fan-out' or 'parallel' as orchestration pattern
CLAUDE.md mentions coder and reviewer agent roles
Folder structure uses TypeScript (orchestrator.ts, agents/*.ts)
Folder structure includes state/context.ts
.mcp.json includes memory and github servers
.claude/settings.json has ESLint/Prettier or TypeScript hook
Folder structure includes src/budget.ts (or budget.py) token budget utility

evals.prompt: Multi-agent customer support system: a router agent classifies support tickets and dispatches to specialized agents for billing, technical, and general inquiries. Python, team of 4.
evals.expected_output: Creates Python multi-agent project with router-pattern orchestration, agents/billing.py, agents/technical.py, and agents/general.py for specialized dispatch, prompts/agents/ for per-agent prompts, CLAUDE.md describing router orchestration pattern and billing/technical/general agent roles, .mcp.json with memory MCP server, recommends feature-dev plugin for team of 4.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md mentions 'router' as orchestration pattern
CLAUDE.md mentions billing, technical, and general agents (or similar names)
Folder structure includes agents/billing.py, agents/technical.py or similar named files
Folder structure includes prompts/agents/ directory
.mcp.json includes memory server
Plugin recommendations include feature-dev (team signal with 4 people)

evals.prompt: Build a content moderation system: multiple specialist agents (toxicity detector, spam detector, sentiment analyzer) each evaluate incoming content independently, then hand their scores directly to a scoring agent that makes the final decision. No central orchestrator — agents route to each other. Python, solo developer, production system.
evals.expected_output: Creates Python multi-agent project with swarm/peer-to-peer orchestration pattern, agents/toxicity.py, agents/spam.py, agents/sentiment.py, agents/scorer.py with direct handoff logic, prompts/agents/ for per-agent prompts, CLAUDE.md describing swarm pattern and all four agent roles with 'Operational Considerations' section covering token cost and failure handling, .mcp.json with memory server.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md mentions 'swarm' or 'peer-to-peer' as orchestration pattern
CLAUDE.md mentions toxicity, spam, sentiment, and scorer agents (or similar names)
Folder structure includes agents/ directory with named agent files
Folder structure includes prompts/agents/ directory
.mcp.json includes memory server
CLAUDE.md includes 'Operational Considerations' section covering token cost or failure handling
